title: docs(apps): remove outdated pollinations.ai enhancer entry
author: fisventurous

gist.headline: Pruning the garden
gist.blurb: A little spring cleaning in the community showcase! We've pruned an older app entry that was built for the legacy website to keep the garden fresh.
gist.summary: Removed an outdated community app entry from the showcase documentation.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app showcase up-to-date by removing a tool that is no longer compatible with the current website.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee acting as a gardener, pruning a small withered leaf from a vibrant digital plant in a lime green pot. Represents cleaning up old/outdated items to keep the ecosystem healthy.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny straw hat, gently pruning a small withered leaf from a vibrant digital code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot. Soft pastel peach and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny straw hat, gently pruning a small withered leaf from a vibrant digital code-plant in a lime green (#ecf874) flower pot.
